messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0171",
  "title": "角色扮演",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 角色扮演

不休旅途绘卷世界

明日方舟

伊瑟

少女前线2：追放

message.content: This section answers questions regarding which video game titles are classified under the "Role-playing" (角色扮演) topic. It explicitly lists four game entities: 不休旅途绘卷世界, 明日方舟, 伊瑟, and 少女前线2：追放. The content is strictly a categorical list and does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
